description.value: Price 2,000 gp; Slot none; CL 9th Weight -; Aura moderate divination DESCRIPTION This 1-inch red marble statue depicts a tiny praying mantis. When the command word is uttered, the mantis comes to life and moves as its owner instructs, as per a sensor eye from a prying eyes spell. The mantis remains animated for up to 9 hours or until it returns to the bearer and replays what it saw, at which point it reverts to statue form for 1 day. If the mantis is destroyed while animate, it reverts to statue form. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells prying eyes
